nasb.text: These are the ones who crossed the Jordan in the first month when it was overflowing all its banks and they put to flight all those in the valleys, both to the east and to the west.

esv.text: These are the men who crossed the Jordan in the first month, when it was overflowing all its banks, and put to flight all those in the valleys, to the east and to the west.

cnv.text: 在正月，約旦河水漲過兩岸的時候，這些人過了河，使全平原的人都東奔西逃。

ccb.text: 一月，约旦河水涨过两岸的时候，他们渡到河对岸，把住在平原的人打得东奔西逃。
